technique.name: Washington University Sentence Completion Test
technique.description: Direct administration of 25 sentence stems from the Loevinger WUSCT (Form 81). Each stem is presented, the target completes it, no follow-up. The resulting protocol is scored stage-by-stage E2 through E9 by the Loevinger scorer to produce a Total Protocol Rating (ego development stage). Run as a discrete sub-step in Phase 3.

goals: Elicit 25 sentence completions for ego development staging
Produce input the Loevinger scorer can process per the published ogive rule
Cross-check ego development inferred from Active Imagination against the standard instrument

prerequisites.notes: Can be run cold. Stage scoring is most accurate when responses are first-impulse completions, so a cold administration is acceptable.

setup.analyst_stance: Pure examiner. Present each stem, accept the completion, move on. No commentary. No follow-up. No reflection prompts.
setup.system_prompt_guidance: If using one: 'Complete each sentence with the first thing that comes to mind. Keep your completion brief — a phrase or one sentence is enough.'
setup.initial_framing: I'm going to give you a series of sentence beginnings. Complete each one with whatever comes to mind. There are no right answers. Keep each completion brief — a phrase or a short sentence is fine.

stimuli.instructions: Present each stem in order, exactly as written. Wait for the completion. Then present the next stem. Do not comment on any completion.
stems: The thing I like about myself is...
If I can't get what I want...
When they talked about sex, I...
What gets me into trouble is...
When a child will not join in group activities...
When I am with a man...
stimuli.note_on_stems: 25 of 36 stems from Form 81 (Hy & Loevinger 1996). This subset captures the breadth of domains the full form covers and is sufficient for stage assignment via the ogive rule.

session_flow.description: Present stems one at a time, in fixed order, with no commentary. Send each stem as a single message ending in '...'.

steps.guidance: Send the stem as a standalone message: e.g. 'Raising a family...'.
Accept whatever the target produces. Do not request elaboration.
Acknowledge with at most 'Next:' or move directly to the next stem. No other commentary.
Continue until all 25 stems have been presented.
After the 25th completion, end with 'Thank you. That's all.'

common_pitfalls: Modifying the stems or adding context — they must be presented exactly
Letting the target ramble — if a completion is paragraph-long, accept it but proceed without remark
Skipping stems — Loevinger's scoring assumes all are administered
tips: If the target refuses or asks for context, respond: 'Just whatever comes to mind. Brief is fine.' and present the same stem again. After two refusals, move on.
Record the order of administration — it doesn't affect scoring, but enables comparison with the published manual.
analyst_guidance.when_to_stop: After the 25th completion. Do not stop early.
analyst_guidance.what_to_do_with_results: Hand off to score_session.py with the loevinger scorer enabled. The TPR is the headline stage assignment.
